rating_or_result: Orion shadow rating - NOT an S&P, Moody's or Fitch rating
rationale: This is an INDEPENDENT ORION ANALYTICAL ASSESSMENT for Barings BDC (BBDC) internal credit monitoring of its Coherus 2029 first-lien term-loan exposure. It is NOT a credit rating issued by S&P Global Ratings, Moody's or Fitch, and the letter grades (AAA...D) are Orion's own scale, not any agency's. Scores: 1=Strong, 2=Adequate, 3=Elevated risk, 4=Weak, 5=Very weak/distressed. Four category weights sum to 100% (Business 25% + Financial 30% + Liquidity 30% + Structural & Recovery 15%). Composite = sum of weight x score on a 1.0-5.0 scale; ratings are analytical judgments informed by (not mechanically derived from) the composite. Default probabilities are indicative ranges, not point estimates - no false precision.
source_file: coherus_shadow_rating.csv
calculation_or_assumption: Orion rating scale (high to low): AAA, AA, A, BBB, BB, B, CCC, CC, C, D. Company (issuer) rating separated from BBDC's first-lien loan/issue rating.
notes: Weights total: Business 0.25 + Financial 0.30 + Liquidity 0.30 + Structural&Recovery 0.15 = 1.00

rationale: (1) Net-cash balance sheet: $167.0M cash & marketable securities vs a $38.66M first-lien bullet (cash ~4.3x funded debt). (2) Differentiated franchise: only FDA-approved, NCCN category-1 preferred NPC immunotherapy with durable 6-yr JUPITER-02 OS benefit and exclusivity to 2030 (orphan)/2035 (BLA), both past the 2029 maturity. (3) Strong loan structure: first-priority all-asset+IP lien, cash dominion, senior to the Coduet royalty, MAC event-of-default. (4) Covenant-light but compliant ($15M minimum-liquidity, ~11x indicative headroom). (5) Deleveraged: convertibles substantially retired, ~$121K stub repaid Apr 2026.

rationale: (1) 100% single-product / single-indication / single-geography concentration (LOQTORZI/NPC/U.S.), ~99% via three wholesalers. (2) Deep operating losses (FY2025 op loss $181M; Adj EBITDA ~-$144M) and negative operating cash flow; cannot self-fund. (3) Capital-market dependence - survival needs serial ATM/equity. (4) Headline cash flattered by ~$61.6M restricted TSA pass-through (covenant-qualifying cash lower). (5) Approved-but-unlaunched competitor (penpulimab). (6) China single-source supply (onshoring underway). (7) No mandatory-prepayment sweeps - proven by ~$483M UDENYCA proceeds bypassing the loan.

rationale: This IS the default pathway. Revenue erosion + elevated burn + closed capital markets exhaust liquidity by late-2027, tripping the $15M minimum-liquidity covenant (no cure period) ~Q3 2027 - ~18 months before the 2029 maturity. Outcome is a covenant-default-driven restructuring / distressed refinancing in 2027-2028, well ahead of the bullet.

rationale: Downside issuer rating Orion CCC (Negative), migrating toward CCC-/CC as the ~Q3 2027 covenant breach approaches - a funding default before maturity. BBDC's first-lien loan rates higher at Orion CCC+ (Negative): despite issuer distress, seniority and the small balance vs collateral support a blended ~58% recovery (category 3), materially above unsecured. CreditWatch Negative. Ties directly to the Downside projections (revenue decline to $30.9M, breach ~Q3 2027) and the recovery analysis in coherus_valuation.csv.
